name: Generate Tailwind - Responsive Card
description: Test code generation: Tailwind CSS responsive card layout
prompt:
Tulis HTML dengan Tailwind CSS untuk card component yang:
- Container: background putih, rounded-lg, shadow-md, padding 6
- Gambar di atas: w-full, h-48, object-cover, rounded-t-lg
- Title: text-xl, font-bold, text-gray-800, mt-4
- Description: text-gray-600, mt-2
- Button: bg-blue-500, text-white, px-4, py-2, rounded, mt-4, hover:bg-blue-600

Berapa jumlah total class Tailwind yang digunakan pada seluruh element (hitung setiap class individual)?
